title: Pre-authorize principal tppp7-aedx6-t5lmu-6qnik-e46l6-jbsl2-jmt6r-dhupo-bkdih-s2avm-zqe as initial admin

requirements.text: Hardcode principal `tppp7-aedx6-t5lmu-6qnik-e46l6-jbsl2-jmt6r-dhupo-bkdih-s2avm-zqe` as an initial admin in the backend admin list, alongside any existing initial admins (e.g., the canister deployer), so that this principal has admin access immediately upon deployment without needing to be added manually.

quotes:
add this person to the admin panel
 tppp7-aedx6-t5lmu-6qnik-e46l6-jbsl2-jmt6r-dhupo-bkdih-s2avm-zqe

acceptanceCriteria: The principal `tppp7-aedx6-t5lmu-6qnik-e46l6-jbsl2-jmt6r-dhupo-bkdih-s2avm-zqe` is included in the initial admin list in `backend/main.mo`.
Calling `isAdmin` with this principal returns `true` immediately after deployment without any manual additions.
Calling `getAdminList()` as an existing admin returns a list that includes `tppp7-aedx6-t5lmu-6qnik-e46l6-jbsl2-jmt6r-dhupo-bkdih-s2avm-zqe`.
All existing admin functionality (add, remove, list) continues to work correctly for other admins.

constraints: Do not remove or replace any existing initial admins (e.g., canister deployer) — only add the new principal alongside them.
Do not modify any immutable frontend paths.
nonGoals: Changing the admin UI or frontend admin panel components.
Adding any new admin management features beyond pre-authorizing this principal.
